name: Flip Bits
description: Flips 0s to 1s and vice versa, then halts at blank.

name: Check Palindrome
description: Checks if the input (over {A, B, C}) is a palindrome.

name: Double X
description: Doubles a string of X's preceded by $. E.g. $XXX -> $XXXXXX.

name: Universal Turing Machine
description: A universal Turing machine that can simulate any other TM given an encoded description on its tape.
